name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan is a significant restructuring of the analysis pipeline. While it covers similar ground (MSD, VACF, PDFs, Ergodicity), the specific methodologies (e.g., Savitzky-Golay filtering, Hill estimator for residence times, new figure layouts, and a different approach to the regime map) differ substantially from the original plan. The original plan had 10 steps, while the new plan has 3, consolidating the logic into different groupings. Therefore, it is safer and more efficient to restart the execution to ensure all new requirements are met correctly.
